description: Multiplayer Pong Time is fun sport game suitable for all ages. Type your nick name wait for your opponent and start playing. Have fun!

name: FootyZag
description: Pass the ball to your teammate and score! Complete challenging levels and unlock crazier and stronger teams. Make sure not to pass the ball to the opponent team!
instructions: Click left or right side of the screen or press left or right arrow key to pass the ball or kick
